topStory.title: Major Platform Upgrade
topStory.description: Loading speed improved significantly and multiple bugs squashed across the platform. Everything runs smoother and more stable than before.

updates.title: New HA Tunnel Config Released
updates.description: Working config added with better connection stability for users on congested networks.

updates.title: Scanner Engine Improved
updates.description: Faster scanning with reduced delay and better accuracy across all network types.

updates.title: New Utility Tool Added
updates.description: Quick system check and diagnostic tool now available under the Tools section.

updates.title: Login Hotfix Deployed
updates.description: Fixed login failures for some users and resolved session timeout bugs.

updates.title: HTTP Injector Profile Updated
updates.description: Latest profile for HTTP Injector updated to match current server endpoints.

updates.title: Server Maintenance Complete
updates.description: Scheduled maintenance completed. All services are back online at full speed.
